1.0.4.en: Fix 3-gang power-on label sync; add Sonoff Zigbee Dongle (router firmware)

1.0.5.en: Fix 3-gang settings label sync when multiple switches are paired; add Sonoff Zigbee USB Dongle with router firmware support

1.0.8.en: Detects reconnection after power outage on NovaDigital and zbmini-r2 switches.

1.0.10.en:
fix: ZBMINIR2 / BASICZBR3 — "Timeout: Expected Response" on on/off commands
fix: SmartPlug — false unavailability at boot due to Zigbee mesh timing
fix: Availability — devices offline before app restart now detected within ~5 min
fix: SonoffBase — operator precedence bug silently breaking single-attribute reads (SNZB-03)
feat: ZBMINIR2 — added ZDO Device Announce as second rejoin signal for faster detection

1.0.12.en:
feat: ZBMINIR2 — added Toggle option to Power-on State setting
feat: ZBMINIR2 — tighter rejoin detection after power cut (corroboration window)
feat: ZBMINIR2 — suppress spurious manufacturer ACK frames
feat: SNZB-02LD / SNZB-02WD — battery percentage reporting aligned with Poll Control interval
fix: SNZB-02WD — temperature and humidity report thresholds corrected (0.5 °C / 3 %RH)

1.0.13.en:
### Added
- Support for a second Tuya Door & Window Sensor model.

### Improved
- Faster time synchronization and network rejoin for the Tuya temperature, humidity and clock sensor.
- IAS enrollment and status handling for Door & Window Sensors and the Sonoff SNZB-03 motion sensor.
- Battery handling for sleeping sensors, avoiding unnecessary communication while devices are asleep.
- Smart plug power monitoring, availability detection and recovery after temporary disconnection.
- Restoration of configured indicator and backlight settings after a power outage.

### Fixed
- Intermittent pairing, delayed initial readings and false offline states on supported Zigbee sensors.

1.0.14.en:
### Added
- Linptech (Moes) radar sensor support.
- Aqara FP1 presence sensor support.
- Water level sensor (US variant) support.

### Improved
- Added settings statistics for message counts per device in the last hour and the last 24h.
- Translated the app UI and driver settings into German, Spanish, and Italian.
- Added missing localization strings for shared flow cards, capabilities, and device setup text.
- Kept the Zigbee driver structure intact while filling the remaining language gaps.

1.0.15.en: Added support for Linptech (Moes), Aqara FP1, and US water level devices. Improved translations and added per-device message statistics for the last 1 hour and 24 hours.

1.0.17.en: Add support Nova Digital Switch 2 Gang Touch

1.0.18.en: Added support for 4-gang and 6-gang switches with manufacturer ID variations
